title: AvM Notes
description: Adds the Banjo, Cello, and Guitar from Animation Vs. Minecraft
body:
Just a simple mod that adds the Guitar, Cello, and Banjo from
"Note Block Battle - Animation vs. Minecraft Shorts Ep 16 (Music by AaronGrooves)" By Alan Becker.
Just a heads up, the Guitar, Cello, and Banjo added in this mod are nowhere near as cool, or effective, as from the original source (Animation vs. Minecraft).


Remember, Animation vs. Minecraft is property of Alan Becker.
